title: Two Kings, One Country
description: On pages 12–15, this part focuses on two kings, one country within the The Two Kings of Zou storyline.
scene: On Zou, the Straw Hats and their allies uncover the Mink Tribe’s suffering, Sanji’s disappearance, Raizo’s secret, and the road toward both Wano and Big Mom.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #9
dialogue.text: What?!

dialogue.speaker: Inuarashi
dialogue.text: Why has the Duke laid down his blade?!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #9
dialogue.text: Across this entire country, better yet, throughout this entire island!!

dialogue.speaker: Kinemon
dialogue.text: You may search for this Samurai at your leisure without any interference from us!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #9
dialogue.text: So cease this devastation at once!!

dialogue.speaker: Robin
dialogue.text: Our country is far too rich in history!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #9
dialogue.text: Hell no.

dialogue.speaker: Inuarashi
dialogue.text: Duke, please run!!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #9
dialogue.text: gyaya AAAAA AAH!!!

dialogue.speaker: Inuarashi
dialogue.text: Duke!!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #10
dialogue.text: What the...!? That definitely ain't your normal dog!!!

dialogue.speaker: Minks
dialogue.text: He brushed off Lord Jack's attack like it was nothing!!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #10
dialogue.text: That Mutt's a Beast!!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #10
dialogue.text: Thought this was supposed to be a fluffy-cuddly animal kingdom?!

dialogue.speaker: Vito
dialogue.text: You've gotta be kidding me!! Our boss, Lord Jack, is infamous and his name resonates throughout the new world...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #11
dialogue.text: with a bounty of...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #11
dialogue.text: One billion B!!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #11
dialogue.text: My underlings never know when to keep their mouths shut.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #11
dialogue.text: Don't go thinkin' you're hot shit just because you stopped one of his attacks!!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #11
dialogue.text: I beg of you!! Do not jump to hasty con-clusions!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #11
dialogue.text: whereze

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #11
dialogue.text: I will say this once... and once only...!!

dialogue.speaker: Kinemon
dialogue.text: I will cease this mayhem when the "Samurai" stands before me.

dialogue.speaker: Kinemon
dialogue.text: The Samurai not being here... Now that is your "sin".

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #12
dialogue.text: This is absolute insanity ....!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #12
dialogue.text: Let me add one more thing!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #12
dialogue.text: I love to destroy.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #12
dialogue.text: A true calamity is upon us...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #12
dialogue.text: What's with all the flood- ing...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #12
dialogue.text: In this country ?!

summary: Two Kings, One Country: On Zou, the Straw Hats and their allies uncover the Mink Tribe’s suffering, Sanji’s disappearance, Raizo’s secret, and the road toward both Wano and Big Mom.
